Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I apologize for asking you to come on such short notice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13226 0 0}Oh, how rude of me! I seem to be distracted, despite requesting your presence in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now then, seeing as you have awakened to your new power and begun exploring, I have something of a proposal for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I happen to have a certain matter on my mind, you see.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}However, it is a matter for which I have yet to find a solution. It has me feeling rather stumped. Quite perplexed. Positively discombobulated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Therefore... Should you allow it, I would like to observe those newfound abilities of yours.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I ask that you fulfill my requests. I believe doing so would prove to be an adequate demonstration of your power.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Naturally, you will be rewarded upon the completion of any such tasks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, that concludes the detailing of my proposal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13231 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I am... very much looking forward to witnessing you utilize the fullest extent of your power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems I can now choose to[n]accept Elizabeth-san's requests.[n]{f 1 1}
